calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Off Calendar

Application For Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Under The Destroyed Records Relief Law
Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Julie Conger, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Lee P. Bardellini, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, T8 Urban Housing Associates, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability,
No appearance by defaulted defendant All Persons Claiming Any Interest in, or Lien Upon, The Real Property Described or Any Part Thereof,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witnesses, Jonathan Shum and Ben Ron, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED and DECREED, that:
1. On February 2, 2016, the date this Action commenced, Plaintiff was the owner in fee simple absolute, and in actual and peaceful possession as owner of all the real property described in the Complaint herein, including the SUBJECT PROPERTY described in Exhibit B, attached hereto, and diagramed in EXHIBIT B-1;
2. Plaintiff's title to the SUBJECT PROPERTY described in Exhibit B, hereto, is established and quieted to the world;
3. All persons other that Plaintiff are perpetually barred, enjoined, and estopped from asserting or setting up any estate, right, title, lien, interest or claim in and to the SUBJECT PROPERTY and any part thereof, whether legal or equitable, present or future, vested or contingent, or mortgages or liens, of any description.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Continued To Nov-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
